revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding the {{translated page}} template is not a "should", it's a "may"; i.e., it is strictly optional, at the discretion of the user. The attribution statement, in contrast, is required by the Terms of Use, and is obligatory—i.e., it trumps even policy and consensus and may never be omitted.
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Expand_language]]
make "article" plural if multiple languages are specified per [[Template_talk:Expand_language#Template-protected_edit_request_on_13_September_2024|edit request]]
1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Expand_language]]
make "article" plural if multiple languages are specified per [[Template_talk:Expand_language#Template-protected_edit_request_on_13_September_2024|edit request]]
1 revision imported: more imports
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
make "article" plural if multiple languages are specified per [[Template_talk:Expand_language#Template-protected_edit_request_on_13_September_2024|edit request]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:Ahecht|Ahecht]]
make "article" plural if multiple languages are specified per [[Template_talk:Expand_language#Template-protected_edit_request_on_13_September_2024|edit request]]
1 revision imported
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 16 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{ambox | name = {{{name|Expand language}}} | subst = {{{subst|{{subst:substcheck}}}}} | type = notice | class = skin-invert-image | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = {{hidden| style = font-size:100%; padding: 0px; | 1 = {{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|You can help expand this {{#ifeq:yes|{{yesno|def=|{{{section|}}}}}|section|article}} with text translated from the corresponding articles in {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[[:{{{langcode|}}}:{{{otherarticle}}}|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]]|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle3|}}}|, [[:{{{langcode3|}}}:{{{otherarticle3}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode3}}}}}|, [[:{{{langcode3}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode3}}}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}]]|, {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}}}}}}} and {{#if:{{{otherarticle2|}}}|[[:{{{langcode2|}}}:{{{otherarticle2}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode2}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode2}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode2}}}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}]]|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}}}}}.|You can help expand this {{#ifeq:yes|{{yesno|def=|{{{section|}}}}}|section|article}} with text translated from {{#if:{{{langcode|}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[[:{{{langcode|}}}:{{{otherarticle}}}|the corresponding article]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|the corresponding article]]|the corresponding article}}}} in {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}|the corresponding article in another language}}.}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}| ''({{{date}}})''}} Click [show] for important translation instructions. | 2 = {{#switch: {{{langcode|}}} |af |am |ar |az |be |be-tarask |bg |bn |bs |ca |ceb |co |cs |cy |da |de |el |en |eo |es |et |eu |fa |fi |fr |fy |ga |gd |gl |gu |ha |haw |he |hi |hr |ht |hu |hy |id |ig |is |it |ja |jv |ka |kk |km |kn |ko |ku |ky |la |lb |lo |lt |lv |mg |mi |mk |ml |mn |mr |ms |mt |my |ne |nl |nn |no |ny |pa |pl |ps |pt |ro |ru |sd |sh |si |sk |sl |sm |sn |so |sq |sr |st |su |sv |sw |ta |te |tg |th |tl |tr |uk |ur |uz |vi |xh |yi |yo |zh |zu = * {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[https://translate.google.com/translate?&u=https%3A%2F%2F{{{langcode|}}}.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2F{{urlencode:{{{otherarticle}}}|WIKI}}&sl={{{googlelangcode|{{{langcode|}}}}}}&tl=en&prev=_t&hl=en View] a machine-translated version of the {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article.|}} * Machine translation, like [https://deepl.com DeepL] or [https://translate.google.com/ Google Translate], is a useful starting point for translations, but translators must revise errors as necessary and confirm that the translation is accurate, rather than simply copy-pasting machine-translated text into the English Wikipedia. |#default = }}{{#if: {{{topic|}}} | | {{#ifexpr: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|pages|R}} > 200 | * Consider '''[[Template:Expand {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}#Topics and categorization|adding a topic]]''' to this template: there are already {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|pages}} articles in the [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|main category]], and specifying{{para|topic}} will aid in categorization. | }} }} * Do not translate text that appears unreliable or low-quality. If possible, verify the text with references provided in the foreign-language article. * You '''must''' provide [[Wikipedia:Copying within Wikipedia|copyright attribution]] in the [[Help:Edit summary|edit summary]] accompanying your translation by providing an [[Help:Interlanguage links|interlanguage link]] to the source of your translation. A model attribution edit summary is {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{langcode}}}}} | Content in this edit is translated from the existing {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia article at [[:{{{langcode}}}:{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|Exact name of the {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}}]]; see its history for attribution. | (using German): Content in this edit is translated from the existing German Wikipedia article at [[:de:Exact name of German article]]; see its history for attribution. }} * You may also add the template {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}|{{Translated|{{{langcode|de}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}}}}}|{{tlc|Translated page|{{{langcode|de}}}|Exact name of {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}} to the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]. * For more guidance, see [[Wikipedia:Translation]]. | headerstyle = padding-right: 3em; font-weight: normal; text-align: left }} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template | {{Sandbox other||}}{{#if:{{{nodoc|}}}| | {{documentation}} }} | {{{category|{{#ifeq:{{{fa}}}|yes|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia |}}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{topic|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia||}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }} }} }}} }}{{Main other|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}||{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{no interwiki}}}|yes||}}}}}}}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Expand by language Wikipedia templates|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:pages with no translate target and no interwiki]] revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_language here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

If possible, verify the text with references provided in the foreign-language article. * You '''must''' provide [[Wikipedia:Copying within Wikipedia|copyright attribution]] in the [[Help:Edit summary|edit summary]] accompanying your translation by providing an [[Help:Interlanguage links|interlanguage link]] to the source of your translation. A model attribution edit summary is {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{langcode}}}}} | Content in this edit is translated from the existing {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia article at [[:{{{langcode}}}:{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|Exact name of the {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}}]]; see its history for attribution. | (using German): Content in this edit is translated from the existing German Wikipedia article at [[:de:Exact name of German article]]; see its history for attribution. }} * You may also add the template {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}|{{Translated|{{{langcode|de}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}}}}}|{{tlc|Translated page|{{{langcode|de}}}|Exact name of {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}} to the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]. * For more guidance, see [[Wikipedia:Translation]]. | headerstyle = padding-right: 3em; font-weight: normal; text-align: left }} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template | {{Sandbox other||}}{{#if:{{{nodoc|}}}| | {{documentation}} }} | {{{category|{{#ifeq:{{{fa}}}|yes|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia |}}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{topic|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia||}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }} }} }}} }}{{Main other|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}||{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{no interwiki}}}|yes||}}}}}}}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Expand by language Wikipedia templates|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]] [[Category:pages with no translate target and no interwiki]] [[Category:pages with no translate target]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{ambox | name = {{{name|Expand language}}} | subst = {{{subst|{{subst:substcheck}}}}} | type = notice | class = skin-invert-image | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = {{hidden| style = font-size:100%; padding: 0px; | 1 = {{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|You can help expand this {{#ifeq:yes|{{yesno|def=|{{{section|}}}}}|section|article}} with text translated from the corresponding articles in {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[[:{{{langcode|}}}:{{{otherarticle}}}|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}]]|{{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle3|}}}|, [[:{{{langcode3|}}}:{{{otherarticle3}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode3}}}}}|, [[:{{{langcode3}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode3}}}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}]]|, {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}}}}}}}} and {{#if:{{{otherarticle2|}}}|[[:{{{langcode2|}}}:{{{otherarticle2}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode2}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode2}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode2}}}}}|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}]]|{{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}}}}}}.|You can help expand this {{#ifeq:yes|{{yesno|def=|{{{section|}}}}}|section|article}} with text translated from {{#if:{{{langcode|}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[[:{{{langcode|}}}:{{{otherarticle}}}|the corresponding article]]|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|[[:{{{langcode}}}:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}|the corresponding article]]|the corresponding article}}}} in {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}|the corresponding article in another language}}.}} {{#if:{{{date|}}}| ''({{{date}}})''}} Click [show] for important translation instructions. | 2 = {{#switch: {{{langcode|}}} |af |am |ar |az |be |be-tarask |bg |bn |bs |ca |ceb |co |cs |cy |da |de |el |en |eo |es |et |eu |fa |fi |fr |fy |ga |gd |gl |gu |ha |haw |he |hi |hr |ht |hu |hy |id |ig |is |it |ja |jv |ka |kk |km |kn |ko |ku |ky |la |lb |lo |lt |lv |mg |mi |mk |ml |mn |mr |ms |mt |my |ne |nl |nn |no |ny |pa |pl |ps |pt |ro |ru |sd |sh |si |sk |sl |sm |sn |so |sq |sr |st |su |sv |sw |ta |te |tg |th |tl |tr |uk |ur |uz |vi |xh |yi |yo |zh |zu = * {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|[https://translate.google.com/translate?&u=https%3A%2F%2F{{{langcode|}}}.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2F{{urlencode:{{{otherarticle}}}|WIKI}}&sl={{{googlelangcode|{{{langcode|}}}}}}&tl=en&prev=_t&hl=en View] a machine-translated version of the {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article.|}} * Machine translation, like [https://deepl.com DeepL] or [https://translate.google.com/ Google Translate], is a useful starting point for translations, but translators must revise errors as necessary and confirm that the translation is accurate, rather than simply copy-pasting machine-translated text into the English Wikipedia. |#default = }}{{#if: {{{topic|}}} | | {{#ifexpr: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|pages|R}} > 200 | * Consider '''[[Template:Expand {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}}#Topics and categorization|adding a topic]]''' to this template: there are already {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|pages}} articles in the [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|main category]], and specifying{{para|topic}} will aid in categorization. | }} }} * Do not translate text that appears unreliable or low-quality. If possible, verify the text with references provided in the foreign-language article. * You '''must''' provide [[Wikipedia:Copying within Wikipedia|copyright attribution]] in the [[Help:Edit summary|edit summary]] accompanying your translation by providing an [[Help:Interlanguage links|interlanguage link]] to the source of your translation. A model attribution edit summary is {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{langcode}}}}} | Content in this edit is translated from the existing {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia article at [[:{{{langcode}}}:{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|}}}}}|Exact name of the {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}}]]; see its history for attribution. | (using German): Content in this edit is translated from the existing German Wikipedia article at [[:de:Exact name of German article]]; see its history for attribution. }} * You may also add the template {{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}|{{Translated|{{{langcode|de}}}|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}|{{{otherarticle}}}|{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode|de}}}}}}}}}|{{tlc|Translated page|{{{langcode|de}}}|Exact name of {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} article}}}} to the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]. * For more guidance, see [[Wikipedia:Translation]]. | headerstyle = padding-right: 3em; font-weight: normal; text-align: left }} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template | {{Sandbox other||}}{{#if:{{{nodoc|}}}| | {{documentation}} }} | {{{category|{{#ifeq:{{{fa}}}|yes|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia |}}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{topic|}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia|}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{{topic|}}} articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia|}}}}}}|{{Main other|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{override_language|{{#language:{{{langcode|}}}|en}}}}} Wikipedia||}}}}{{#if:{{{langcode2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode2|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }}{{#if:{{{langcode3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:Articles needing translation from {{#language:{{{langcode3|}}}|en}} Wikipedia||}} }} }} }}} }}{{Main other|{{#if:{{{otherarticle|}}}||{{#if:{{Wikidata sitelink|lang={{{langcode}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{no interwiki}}}|yes||}}}}}}}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
